tests.title: Quarterly User Access Review
tests.description: Review active user access to confirm access remains appropriate for job responsibilities.
tests.procedure: Obtain user exports from key systems, compare access to current roles, document reviewer sign-off, and track removals or changes.
tests.expectedResult: User access is reviewed by authorized personnel and inappropriate access is removed or remediated.

tests.title: Privileged Access Review
tests.description: Review privileged accounts to confirm elevated access is approved, limited, and still required.
tests.procedure: Export privileged users, validate business justification and approvals, confirm terminated or transferred users were removed, and document exceptions.
tests.expectedResult: Privileged access is approved, appropriate, and restricted to authorized users.

tests.title: MFA Verification
tests.description: Verify multi-factor authentication is enforced for users, privileged users, and remote access.
tests.procedure: Inspect identity provider settings and MFA enrollment reports to confirm MFA enforcement for applicable users and applications.
tests.expectedResult: MFA is enabled and enforced for all required accounts and access paths.

tests.title: Access Provisioning Review
tests.description: Verify new access grants are approved before being provisioned.
tests.procedure: Select a sample of new users and access changes, inspect approval tickets, and compare granted access to requested access.
tests.expectedResult: Access is provisioned only after documented approval and matches business need.

tests.title: Access Deprovisioning Review
tests.description: Verify terminated users and transferred employees have access removed or updated in a timely manner.
tests.procedure: Compare HR termination and transfer records to system access logs and confirm access removal or modification dates.
tests.expectedResult: Access is removed or updated promptly when users leave or change roles.

tests.title: Patch Verification
tests.description: Verify security patches are applied according to the organization's patch management expectations.
tests.procedure: Review patch reports, vulnerability findings, and remediation records for servers, endpoints, and critical infrastructure.
tests.expectedResult: Critical and high-risk patches are remediated within defined timelines or documented as approved exceptions.

tests.title: Vulnerability Scan Review
tests.description: Review vulnerability scan results and verify remediation tracking.
tests.procedure: Inspect vulnerability scan reports, validate severity ratings, and confirm remediation status for open findings.
tests.expectedResult: Vulnerabilities are identified, prioritized, and tracked through remediation.

tests.title: Firewall Review
tests.description: Review firewall and network access rules for appropriateness and least privilege.
tests.procedure: Export firewall rules, identify broad or risky access, validate business justification, and document remediation.
tests.expectedResult: Firewall rules are authorized, necessary, and do not expose systems beyond business need.

tests.title: Cloud Configuration Review
tests.description: Review cloud resource configurations for insecure settings and policy violations.
tests.procedure: Inspect cloud security posture findings, validate public exposure and encryption settings, and track remediation.
tests.expectedResult: Cloud resources are configured according to approved security baselines.

tests.title: Asset Inventory Review
tests.description: Verify that critical systems, applications, endpoints, and cloud assets are included in the asset inventory.
tests.procedure: Compare asset inventory against cloud, endpoint, and application sources and document missing or retired assets.
tests.expectedResult: The asset inventory is complete, current, and includes ownership information.

tests.title: Endpoint Protection Review
tests.description: Verify endpoint protection is deployed and active on in-scope endpoints.
tests.procedure: Review endpoint security console reports for coverage, alerts, and noncompliant devices.
tests.expectedResult: Endpoints are protected, monitored, and exceptions are tracked.

tests.title: Change Approval Review
tests.description: Verify production changes are documented and approved before deployment.
tests.procedure: Select production changes, inspect change tickets, validate approvals, and confirm deployment traceability.
tests.expectedResult: Production changes are approved and traceable to documented requests.

tests.title: Secure Code Review
tests.description: Verify application changes receive appropriate code review before release.
tests.procedure: Select merged changes and inspect pull requests for reviewer approval, security-relevant comments, and merge controls.
tests.expectedResult: Code changes are reviewed and approved before being merged or released.

tests.title: Dependency Scan Review
tests.description: Review dependency scan results for vulnerable third-party packages.
tests.procedure: Inspect dependency scan reports, confirm remediation of critical findings, and document accepted risks.
tests.expectedResult: Dependency vulnerabilities are identified and remediated within defined timelines.

tests.title: Release Testing Verification
tests.description: Verify releases are tested before production deployment.
tests.procedure: Select releases and inspect test results, deployment approvals, and rollback readiness.
tests.expectedResult: Releases have testing evidence and approval before deployment.

tests.title: Log Review
tests.description: Verify security and system logs are reviewed for suspicious or abnormal activity.
tests.procedure: Inspect log review records, sampled alerts, and escalation evidence for relevant systems.
tests.expectedResult: Logs are reviewed and suspicious activity is investigated.

tests.title: Security Alert Verification
tests.description: Verify security alerts are configured, reviewed, and escalated when needed.
tests.procedure: Review alert rules, alert queues, response tickets, and evidence of escalation for significant events.
tests.expectedResult: Security alerts are reviewed by assigned personnel and escalated based on severity.

tests.title: Log Retention Review
tests.description: Verify logs are retained and protected according to retention expectations.
tests.procedure: Inspect log retention settings, access restrictions, and storage configuration for critical log sources.
tests.expectedResult: Logs are retained securely and protected from unauthorized modification or deletion.

tests.title: Incident Response Tabletop Exercise
tests.description: Verify incident response procedures are tested through a tabletop exercise.
tests.procedure: Conduct a tabletop exercise, document participants, scenario, decisions, gaps, and follow-up actions.
tests.expectedResult: Incident response roles and procedures are tested and improvement actions are tracked.

tests.title: Incident Ticket Review
tests.description: Review security incident tickets for documentation, escalation, resolution, and closure.
tests.procedure: Select incident tickets and inspect timeline, severity, containment, communication, remediation, and closure evidence.
tests.expectedResult: Incidents are documented, investigated, remediated, and closed appropriately.

tests.title: Post-Incident Review
tests.description: Verify completed incidents include root cause analysis and corrective action tracking.
tests.procedure: Inspect closed incidents for post-incident review documentation, lessons learned, and corrective action closure.
tests.expectedResult: Significant incidents include documented lessons learned and tracked remediation.

tests.title: Vendor Due Diligence
tests.description: Verify vendors are reviewed for security and compliance before onboarding.
tests.procedure: Review vendor risk assessments, security questionnaires, security reports, and approval records for new vendors.
tests.expectedResult: Vendors are assessed and approved before use based on risk and data access.

tests.title: Annual Vendor Review
tests.description: Verify existing vendors are reassessed periodically based on risk.
tests.procedure: Review vendor inventory, risk ratings, updated security reports, and monitoring results for critical vendors.
tests.expectedResult: Critical and high-risk vendors are reviewed periodically and risk decisions are documented.

tests.title: Vendor Access Review
tests.description: Review vendor access to systems and data for appropriateness.
tests.procedure: Export vendor accounts, validate approvals and business need, and confirm removal of unnecessary access.
tests.expectedResult: Vendor access is approved, limited, and removed when no longer needed.

tests.title: Backup Verification
tests.description: Verify backups are completing successfully for in-scope systems and data.
tests.procedure: Review backup job reports, failed backup remediation, and coverage for critical systems.
tests.expectedResult: Backups run successfully and failures are investigated and remediated.

tests.title: Backup Restore Test
tests.description: Verify backups can be restored successfully.
tests.procedure: Perform a restore test for selected systems or data and document results, issues, and remediation.
tests.expectedResult: Backups are restorable and recovery issues are tracked to resolution.

tests.title: Disaster Recovery Test
tests.description: Verify disaster recovery procedures support restoration of critical services.
tests.procedure: Test disaster recovery procedures against defined recovery objectives and document gaps.
tests.expectedResult: Recovery procedures are tested and gaps are tracked to closure.

tests.title: Security Awareness Training Review
tests.description: Verify employees complete required security awareness training.
tests.procedure: Review training completion reports and follow-up records for incomplete training.
tests.expectedResult: Employees complete required security awareness training within the defined timeframe.

tests.title: Policy Acknowledgement Review
tests.description: Verify employees acknowledge required security and compliance policies.
tests.procedure: Review acknowledgement reports for required policies and document follow-up for missing acknowledgements.
tests.expectedResult: Employees acknowledge required policies within the defined timeframe.

tests.title: Encryption Configuration Review
tests.description: Verify sensitive data is protected with encryption in storage and transmission where required.
tests.procedure: Inspect encryption settings for databases, storage, backups, and transmission paths used for sensitive data.
tests.expectedResult: Sensitive data is encrypted according to policy and exceptions are documented.

tests.title: Data Retention Review
tests.description: Verify data retention and deletion practices align with documented requirements.
tests.procedure: Review retention schedules, deletion records, archival procedures, and exceptions for in-scope data.
tests.expectedResult: Data is retained and disposed according to approved retention requirements.
